tests.scenario: Verify background persistence during low-memory states
steps: Start a sleep tracking session
Move the app to the background
Simulate a high-memory usage event via OS developer tools
Wait for 8 hours of background operation
Re-open the app
tests.expected_result: The session remains active and data logging is continuous without termination.
tests.notes: Updated to include a measurable 8-hour background window and specific OS memory simulation.

tests.scenario: Verify data recovery after an unexpected application crash
steps: Start a sleep tracking session and log data for 5 minutes
Force-close the application to simulate a crash
Restart the application
Check for the 'Resume Session' prompt
tests.expected_result: The session is restored with no more than 60 seconds of missing data.
tests.notes: Added a strict 60-second recovery threshold to ensure data integrity.

tests.scenario: Monitor CPU and Thermal levels on legacy hardware
steps: Launch the app on a legacy device (Android 10+ / iOS 14+)
Initiate an overnight sleep tracking session
Monitor CPU usage and device temperature periodically
tests.expected_result: CPU usage remains below 15% and device temperature does not exceed 40°C.
tests.notes: Revised to target specific legacy hardware constraints identified in user reviews.

tests.scenario: Verify functionality of the Crash Report diagnostic tool
steps: Trigger a controlled app crash
Re-open the app
Select the 'Send Diagnostic Report' button on the prompt
tests.expected_result: The system successfully transmits a diagnostic log package to the support server.
tests.notes: Converted a generic support test into a functional verification of log transmission.

steps: Open the main Settings menu
Navigate to the 'Manage Subscription' section
Click the 'Cancel' button
tests.expected_result: The cancellation confirmation screen is reached in exactly two taps from settings.
tests.notes: Revised expected result to measure interaction efficiency (two-tap limit).

tests.scenario: Verify Premium labeling and price disclosure
steps: Open the content library
Browse to a locked 'Premium' content thumbnail
Inspect the thumbnail for pricing or tier information
tests.expected_result: The subscription cost or required tier is clearly visible before the user clicks.
tests.notes: Updated to ensure pricing visibility is confirmed before user engagement.

steps: Set a trial to expire in exactly 48 hours
Monitor push notification and email channels
Verify arrival of the system-triggered event
tests.expected_result: Both a push notification and an email are received exactly 48 hours before billing.
tests.notes: Added multi-channel verification to ensure user awareness of billing cycles.

tests.scenario: Download PDF invoice from Billing History
steps: Navigate to the 'Billing History' tab
Select a past transaction from the list
Click the 'Download PDF' icon
tests.expected_result: A valid PDF invoice is generated and downloaded to local storage.
tests.notes: Refined to verify the physical generation and download of the invoice file.

tests.scenario: Verify automated metadata attachment in dispute forms
steps: Select a transaction for dispute
Open the in-app dispute form
Submit the form to the support system
tests.expected_result: The form includes the correct Transaction ID and User ID automatically.
tests.notes: Added verification for automated metadata attachment to reduce manual user entry.

tests.scenario: Verify offline playback in Airplane Mode
steps: Download 500MB of meditation tracks
Enable Airplane Mode (disable all data/Wi-Fi)
Attempt to play a downloaded track
tests.expected_result: The track plays immediately without any network-related errors.
tests.notes: Specified a 500MB storage limit to match the refined hybrid requirement.

steps: Start a guided meditation session
Adjust the 'Guide Voice' slider to 0%
Adjust the 'Background Nature Sounds' slider to 100%
tests.expected_result: The guide voice is muted while background audio remains audible.
tests.notes: Refined steps to test the extreme boundaries (0% vs 100%) of the audio mixer.

tests.scenario: Verify gapless looping in custom sleep playlists
steps: Create a playlist with three separate audio tracks
Enable the 'Loop' feature
Observe the transition between track 1 and track 2
tests.expected_result: The audio transition is seamless with no audible pops or gaps.
tests.notes: Added a qualitative check for gapless playback to improve the user experience.

steps: Complete a 10-minute sleep session
Terminate the session
Immediately open the external health app
tests.expected_result: The session data appears in the health app within 10 seconds of completion.
tests.notes: Added a strict 10-second latency check for external API synchronization.

steps: Navigate to the 'Data Export' section
Generate a CSV export of historical trends
Open the file to verify columns
tests.expected_result: The CSV contains Date, Start Time, End Time, and Quality Score columns.
tests.notes: Refined expected result to specify the exact schema required for the data export.
